fixed supply enforcement, pricing, and ECDSA-based allowlist discounts.      The allowlist works by the project owner pre-signing a typed message for each      approved address off-chain. The contract recovers the signer from the submitted      signature and checks it matches the known signer wallet \u2014 no Merkle tree needed.","kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"params":{"_artist":"Wallet that receives mint proceeds","_nft":"Address of the EncryptedERC721 contract","_signer":"Wallet that signs allowlist entries off-chain"}},"eip712Domain()":{"details":"See: https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-5267"},"mint(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2],uint256[14],address)":{"params":{"_pA":"ZK proof parameter A","_pB":"ZK proof parameter B","_pC":"ZK proof parameter C","_pubSignals":"Public signals (ZK circuit outputs)","to":"Address to receive the minted token"}},"mintAllowlist(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2],uint256[14],address,bytes)":{"details":"The caller must provide a signature that was produced off-chain by the      signer wallet over the EIP-712 message Allowlist(address wallet=msg.sender).      How to generate the signature (ethers.js v6):        const domain = { name: \"CipherMinter\", version: \"1\", chainId, verifyingContract: minterAddress };        const types  = { Allowlist: [{ name: \"wallet\", type: \"address\" }] };        const sig    = await signerWallet.signTypedData(domain, types, { wallet: userAddress });","params":{"_pA":"ZK proof parameter A","_pB":"ZK proof parameter params._signer: Wallet that signs allowlist entries off-chain

params.to: Address to receive the minted token

mintAllowlist(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],u.details: The caller must provide a signature that was produced off-chain by the      signer wallet over the EIP-712 message Allowlist(address wallet=msg.sender).      How to generate the signature (ethers.js v6):        const domain = { name: "CipherMinter", version: "1", chainId, verifyingContract: minterAddress };        const types  = { Allowlist: [{ name: "wallet", type: "address" }] };        const sig    = await signerWallet.signTypedData(domain, types, { wallet: userAddress });

params.sig: 65-byte ECDSA signature from the signer wallet
params.to: Address to receive the minted token

setSigner(address).details: Rotate this if the signer key is ever compromised

allowlistUsed(address).notice: Tracks addresses that have consumed their allowlist spot

artist().notice: Artist wallet — receives all mint proceeds immediately

nft().notice: The EncryptedERC721 contract this minter controls

remainingSupply().notice: How many tokens are still mintable

signer().notice: Wallet whose private key signs allowlist entries off-chain

withdraw().notice: Recover any ETH that gets stuck (should normally be zero)
